```{r}
library(wingen)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(terra)
library(vcfR)
source(here("general_functions.R"))
plotpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
```

```{r}
gea_dos <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "genes.raw"))
dos <- read_table(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "nogea_thinned.raw"))

coords <- 
  get_coords(sf = TRUE) %>% 
  filter(SampleID %in% gea_dos$IID) %>% 
  st_transform(3310) %>%
  # REMOVE CHANNEL ISLAND
  filter(SampleID != "Scelocci_CCGPMC_MW01-3-14") 
gea_dos <- gea_dos[gea_dos$IID %in% coords$SampleID, ]
dos <- dos[dos$IID %in% coords$SampleID, ]

# Confirm orders are the same
stopifnot(all(dos$IID == gea_dos$IID))
stopifnot(all(dos$IID == coords$SampleID))

# Convert to heterozygosity using ifelse for matrices
het <- dos[, -(1:6)]
gea_het <- gea_dos[, -(1:6)]
het <- matrix(ifelse(het == 1, 1, 0), nrow = nrow(het), ncol = ncol(het))
gea_het <- matrix(ifelse(gea_het == 1, 1, 0), nrow = nrow(gea_het), ncol = ncol(gea_het))

# Confirm conversion works (same number of 1s)
stopifnot(sum(het == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == sum(dos[, -(1:6)] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))
stopifnot(sum(gea_het == 1, na.rm = TRUE) == sum(gea_dos[, -(1:6)] == 1, na.rm = TRUE))

# Make test dataset with calculate heterozygosity
test_df <- data.frame(Ho_gea = rowMeans(gea_het, na.rm = TRUE), Ho = rowMeans(het, na.rm = TRUE), coords)
```

```{r}
tmean_dif <- rast(here("data", "env", "tmean_dif.tif")) %>% project("EPSG:3310")
lyr <- tmean_dif
lyr[lyr == 0] <- NA

png(here(plotpath, "gea_genes.png"), width = 800, height = 800)
sc <- preview_gd(lyr, coords, wdim = 11, sample_count = FALSE)
#sc[sc == 0] <- NA
#plot(sc)
dev.off()

run_wingen <- function(wdim, min_n = 1, cache = TRUE) {
  path = here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", paste0("windowed_ho_gea_wdim_", wdim, "_min_n_", min_n, ".tif"))

  if (file.exists(path) && cache) {
    stack <- rast(path)
    return(stack)
  }

  future::plan("multisession", workers = 10)
  wg <- window_general(het, coords, lyr, stat = "Ho", wdim = wdim, min_n = min_n)
  wg_gea <- window_general(gea_het, coords, lyr, stat = "Ho", wdim = wdim, min_n = min_n)
  
  tmean_dif_vals <- terra::extract(tmean_dif, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
  custom <- function(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  wdif <- window_general(tmean_dif_vals, coords, lyr, stat = custom, wdim = wdim, min_n = min_n)
  future::plan("sequential")

  stack <- c(wg[["Ho"]], wg_gea[["Ho"]], wdif[["custom"]])
  names(stack) <- c("Ho", "Ho_gea", "tmean_dif")
  writeRaster(stack, filename = path, overwrite = TRUE)

  return(stack)
}

stack <- run_wingen(wdim = 11, min_n = 1)
stack2 <- run_wingen(wdim = 15, min_n = 1)

png(here(plotpath, "wingen.png"), width = 1600, height = 1600)
par(mfrow = c(2, 3))
plot_gd(stack[[1]], main = "Ho", col = viridis::viridis(100))
plot_gd(stack[[2]], main = "Ho_gea", col = viridis::viridis(100))
plot_gd(stack[[3]], main = "tmean_dif", col = viridis::viridis(100))

plot_gd(stack2[[1]], main = "Ho", col = viridis::viridis(100))
plot_gd(stack2[[2]], main = "Ho_gea", col = viridis::viridis(100))
plot_gd(stack2[[3]], main = "tmean_dif", col = viridis::viridis(100))
dev.off()
```

# Models

## wdim = 11
```{r}
df <- as.data.frame(stack, xy = TRUE)
lm(Ho ~ tmean_dif, data = df) %>% broom::tidy()
lm(Ho_gea ~ tmean_dif, data = df) %>% broom::tidy()
df$resids <- residuals(lm(Ho_gea ~ Ho, data = df))

test_df$tmean_dif <- extract(tmean_dif, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
test_df$Ho_wg <- extract(stack[["Ho"]], coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
test_df$Ho_gea_wg <- extract(stack[["Ho_gea"]], coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
lm(Ho_wg ~ tmean_dif, data = test_df) %>% broom::tidy()
lm(Ho_gea_wg ~ tmean_dif, data = test_df) %>% broom::tidy()

library(ggpubr)
ca <- get_ca() %>% st_transform(st_crs(stack))
plt1 <-
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Ho)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Genome-wide\nheterozygosity") +
  theme_void() 

plt2 <- 
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Ho_gea)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Adaptive\nheterozygosity") +
  theme_void()

plt3 <- 
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = resids)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Residuals") +
  theme_void()

plt4 <- 
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = tmean_dif)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Contemporary\ntemperature\nchange") +
  theme_void()

pltA <- 
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Ho, y = Ho_gea)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = tmean_dif), alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_smooth(, method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_cor() +
  labs(x = "Genome-wide heterozygosity", y = "Adaptive heterozygosity", col = "Contemporary\ntemperature\nchange") 

pltB <- 
  ggplot(df, aes(x = tmean_dif, y = resids)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_smooth(, method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_cor() +
  labs(x = "Contemporary temperature change", y = "Residuals") 

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "wingen.pdf"), width = 15, height = 3)
cowplot::plot_grid(plt1, plt2, plt3, plt4, nrow = 1)
dev.off()

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "wingen_model.pdf"), width = 9.5, height = 4)
cowplot::plot_grid(pltA, pltB, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.8))
dev.off()
```

## wdim = 15
```{r}
df <- as.data.frame(stack2, xy = TRUE)
lm(Ho ~ tmean_dif, data = df) %>% broom::tidy()
lm(Ho_gea ~ tmean_dif, data = df) %>% broom::tidy()
df$resids <- residuals(lm(Ho_gea ~ Ho, data = df))

test_df$tmean_dif <- extract(tmean_dif, coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
test_df$Ho_wg <- extract(stack2[["Ho"]], coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
test_df$Ho_gea_wg <- extract(stack2[["Ho_gea"]], coords, ID = FALSE)[,1]
lm(Ho_wg ~ tmean_dif, data = test_df) %>% broom::tidy()
lm(Ho_gea_wg ~ tmean_dif, data = test_df) %>% broom::tidy()

library(ggpubr)
ca <- get_ca() %>% st_transform(st_crs(stack2))
plt1 <-
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Ho)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Genome-wide\nheterozygosity") +
  theme_void()

plt2 <-
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = Ho_gea)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Adaptive\nheterozygosity") +
  theme_void()

plt3 <-
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = resids)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Residuals") +
  theme_void()

plt4 <-
  ggplot(df) + 
  geom_sf(data = ca) +
  geom_raster(aes(x = x, y = y, fill = tmean_dif)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  labs(fill = "Contemporary\ntemperature\nchange") +
  theme_void()

pltA <-
  ggplot(df, aes(x = Ho, y = Ho_gea)) +
  geom_point(aes(col = tmean_dif), alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_smooth(, method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "mako") +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_cor() +
  labs(x = "Genome-wide heterozygosity", y = "Adaptive heterozygosity", col = "Contemporary\ntemperature\nchange")

pltB <-
  ggplot(df, aes(x = tmean_dif, y = resids)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
  geom_smooth(, method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_classic() +
  stat_cor() +
  labs(x = "Contemporary temperature change", y = "Residuals")

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "wingen2.pdf"), width = 15, height = 3)
cowplot::plot_grid(plt1, plt2, plt3, plt4, nrow = 1)
dev.off()

pdf(here("analysis", "gea", "plots", "wingen_model2.pdf"), width = 9.5, height = 4)
cowplot::plot_grid(pltA, pltB, nrow = 1, rel_widths = c(1, 0.8))
dev.off()
```
